canvas.workspaceSubtitle: Visual workspaces for qualitative interview coding

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.pageSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your research grows.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

landing.heroDescription: Code transcripts, discover patterns, and build theory — all on an infinite, interactive canvas. Built for researchers, by researchers.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free forever for basic use.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for qualitative analysis
landing.codeTranscriptsDesc: Highlight text, assign codes, and build your codebook. Drag codes into hierarchies. Merge and split as your analysis evolves.
landing.visualCanvasDesc: Arrange transcripts, codes, memos, and analysis nodes on an infinite canvas. See your entire project at a glance.
landing.analysisToolsDesc: Word clouds, co-occurrence, clustering, sentiment, framework matrix, treemaps, and more — all computed live.
landing.autoCodeDesc: Automatically apply codes across transcripts using keyword or regex patterns. Hours of coding done in seconds.
landing.casesCrossCaseDesc: Organize transcripts into cases. Compare coding patterns across cases with the framework matrix.
landing.ethicsComplianceDesc: Track consent, anonymize transcripts, set data retention dates, and maintain a full audit trail.
landing.ctaDescription: Join researchers using QualCanvas for qualitative analysis. Free to start, powerful to grow.
